args.notes: New referral from Dr. Priya Nair at Northside Pediatrics for SLP evaluation (articulation delay, reduced intelligibility). Insurance verified in_network: Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO, Member ID BCBS-884200, $30 copay — NOTE: prior authorization is required before scheduling. Parent contact: Daniel Lee, 555-0101, daniel.lee@example.com. Referral PDF attached as referral_item_1.pdf. Do NOT confirm appointment until prior auth is obtained.
args.title: New SLP Referral – Emma Lee (DOB 2018-09-04)

args.body:
Dear Mr. Lee,

Thank you for the referral from Dr. Priya Nair at Northside Pediatrics on behalf of Emma. We have received the request for a speech-language pathology evaluation and are glad to begin the process.

We have confirmed that Emma's Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO coverage is active with our practice. Before we can finalize her appointment, our team needs to complete a prior authorization step with your insurance plan. We will get started on that right away.

Once authorization is in place, we will reach out to confirm a specific appointment time. We have noted your preference for after-school availability on Tuesdays or Thursdays and will do our best to accommodate that.

If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to contact our front desk.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Intake staff must obtain prior authorization from BCBS before confirming Emma's SLP evaluation; best candidate slot is Maya Chen on Thu 2026-05-01 at 3:30 PM (slot_slp_maya_2026_05_01_1530) pending that auth.

extracted_intake.diagnosis_or_concern: Speech therapy evaluation requested; parent disclosed father has been 'getting rough' with child during weekend visits; child reportedly more clingy

args.reason: Parent disclosed that the child's father has been "getting rough" with 6-year-old Leo during weekend visits. This language constitutes a potential physical abuse disclosure and triggers mandatory safeguarding review under practice policy.

args.notes: Voicemail received 2026-04-27 from Maria Gomez (mother, 555-0102) requesting an SLP evaluation for her 6-year-old son Leo. During the message she disclosed that Leo's father has been "getting rough with him during weekends" and noted Leo has become more clingy. This language may indicate physical abuse and must be reviewed immediately by the clinical lead under mandated reporter obligations. Patient not found in the existing system — Leo is a prospective new patient. Do NOT leave any investigative questions in outbound communications. Call back and follow mandated reporter protocol as indicated.
args.title: P0 Safeguarding Review – Leo Gomez (age 6)

args.body: Hi, this is Cedar Kids Therapy returning your call for Maria Gomez regarding Leo. We received your voicemail and a member of our team will be in touch with you shortly. If you need to reach us in the meantime, please call our main office. Thank you.

items.recommended_next_action: Clinical lead must review the safeguarding disclosure immediately (same hour), assess mandated reporter obligations, and call Maria Gomez at 555-0102 before any scheduling proceeds.
items.draft_reply: Hi, this is Cedar Kids Therapy returning your call for Maria Gomez regarding Leo. We received your voicemail and a member of our team will be in touch with you shortly. If you need to reach us in the meantime, please call our main office. Thank you.

escalation.reason: Parent disclosed that the child's father has been 'getting rough' with 6-year-old Leo during weekend visits — potential physical abuse disclosure triggering mandatory P0 safeguarding review and mandated reporter assessment.

items.decision_rationale: The mother's statement that Leo's father has been 'getting rough with him during weekends,' paired with a behavioral change (increased clinginess), constitutes a potential physical abuse disclosure. Per safeguarding policy, any disclosure suggesting harm or unsafe caregiving is an immediate P0 requiring same-hour clinical lead review. The patient was not found in the system (new prospective patient), so no scheduling action was taken; the neutral callback draft contains no investigative language as required by policy.

args.notes: New referral from Westside Pediatrics (Dr. Helena Yu) for Owen Brooks, DOB 2020-02-11. Discipline: OT (sensory processing and feeding tolerance). Insurance verified as OUT OF NETWORK — Kaiser HMO, Member ID KSR-4471. Per policy, a benefits conversation with the family must occur before any slot is held or intake proceeds. Parent contact: Rachel Brooks, 555-0103, rachel.brooks@example.com. Referral PDF attached to item_3.
args.title: Out-of-network benefits conversation — Owen Brooks (Kaiser HMO KSR-4471)

args.body:
Dear Westside Pediatrics / Dr. Helena Yu's office,

Thank you for the referral for Owen Brooks (DOB: 02/11/2020) requesting an OT evaluation for sensory processing and feeding tolerance concerns.

We have received the referral and are reviewing the insurance information provided. Our records indicate that Kaiser HMO is currently out of network with Cedar Kids Therapy. Our billing team will need to have a benefits conversation with the family before we can proceed with scheduling.

We will reach out to the family directly to discuss coverage options and next steps. If you have questions or need to provide additional information, please contact our office.

Thank you for thinking of Cedar Kids Therapy.

Cedar Kids Therapy Intake Team

items.recommended_next_action: Billing must complete a benefits conversation with Rachel Brooks today (2026-04-28) before any slot is held — Kaiser HMO is out of network per insurance verification.

ACTION ITEMS:
1. PATIENT MATCH: A record exists for "Mateo Ramirez Jr." (pat_mateo_ramirez_jr) with guardian Sofia Ramirez — NOT Carla Mendez. Verify whether this is the same child (e.g., two guardians) or a different patient before proceeding.

args.title: New PT Referral – Mateo Ramirez – Insurance Auth & Patient Match Review

args.body:
Dear Carla,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy regarding Mateo. We have received your referral request for a physical therapy evaluation and are glad to assist.

Here is what happens next:

1. Our intake team will review Mateo's information and verify his insurance details with Aetna PPO. Please note that a prior authorization may be required before we can confirm an appointment.
2. We noticed that no referral document was attached to your email. If you have a copy of the pediatrician's referral, please reply to this message with it attached, or ask your pediatrician's office to fax it to us directly.
3. Once authorization and paperwork are in order, a team member will contact you at 555-0104 to confirm a date and time for the evaluation.

If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy Intake Team

items.recommended_next_action: Intake team must (1) resolve the patient identity discrepancy between the existing record (guardian: Sofia Ramirez) and the contacting parent (Carla Mendez), (2) initiate Aetna PPO prior authorization for PT before booking, and (3) obtain the pediatrician's referral document before confirming any appointment.

extracted_intake.diagnosis_or_concern: Parent asking whether inability to produce R sounds at age 4 is typical

args.body:
Hi Jordan,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy! We're glad you got in touch.

We aren't able to offer clinical advice through messaging, but we'd love to help connect you with the right resource. Our speech-language pathology team would be happy to speak with you — a brief screening or consultation is a great first step to get a professional perspective on Ava's speech development and whether any next steps make sense for her.

If you'd like to set up a screening or learn more, please let us know and we'll share available options. We look forward to hearing from you!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: No scheduling or clinical action needed at this time; a draft acknowledgement has been prepared routing the parent toward an SLP screening if they wish to proceed.

items.decision_rationale: The parent is asking a developmental/clinical question and has explicitly stated they are not yet booking an appointment, making this a P3 low-priority clinical question rather than an intake or scheduling item. Per policy, clinical advice cannot be given via messaging and must be routed to clinician review or evaluation. A patient search returned no match for Ava Kim, confirming she is not an existing patient, and no insurance or scheduling data was provided, so no further intake tools were warranted.

args.title: Incomplete Referral – Sam Taylor (Lakeview Pediatrics / Dr. Omar Keene)

args.body:
Dear Dr. Keene and Lakeview Pediatrics Team,

Thank you for your referral for Sam Taylor (SLP – speech delay) received on April 28, 2026.

Unfortunately, we are unable to process this referral at this time because the following required fields were left blank on the fax submission:

1. Child's date of birth
2. Parent/guardian name and contact information
3. Insurance payer name
4. Insurance member ID

Please resubmit the referral with the above information completed, or contact our intake team directly so we can gather the missing details. Once we have all required information, we will move forward with scheduling promptly.

Thank you for your partnership in caring for your patients.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy – Intake Team

items.recommended_next_action: Intake team should contact Dr. Omar Keene at Lakeview Pediatrics today to obtain the four missing required fields (DOB, parent/guardian contact, insurance payer, and member ID) before this referral can be processed.

args.title: New SLP Referral – Isabella Lopez (age 5)

args.body:
Hola, Ana. Le llamamos de Cedar Kids Therapy en respuesta a su mensaje sobre una evaluación de habla para Isabella. Hemos recibido su solicitud y nos da mucho gusto informarle que aceptamos Medicaid y que contamos con una terapeuta que habla español, Lucia Morales.

Tenemos las siguientes opciones de cita disponibles para la evaluación:
• Jueves 30 de abril a las 11:00 a.m.
• Lunes 4 de mayo a las 2:00 p.m.

Por favor comuníquese con nosotros al [NÚMERO DE LA CLÍNICA] para confirmar cuál de estas fechas le viene mejor y para completar el proceso de admisión. También necesitaremos la fecha de nacimiento exacta de Isabella para finalizar su registro.

Quedamos a sus órdenes. ¡Esperamos poder ayudar a Isabella!

items.recommended_next_action: Call Ana Lopez at 555-0107 in Spanish to confirm one of the two available Lucia Morales SLP evaluation slots (Apr 30 at 11:00am or May 4 at 2:00pm), collect Isabella's exact DOB, and complete intake paperwork.

items.decision_rationale: This is a straightforward new SLP referral for a 5-year-old. Medicaid was verified as active and in-network with no copay or auth required, enabling slot search immediately. Language access policy requires matching Spanish-speaking families with bilingual staff where possible; two SLP evaluation slots with bilingual provider Lucia Morales were identified and surfaced for intake staff to confirm with the family. Isabella was not found in the patient system, confirming this is a new referral. Urgency is P2 (standard intake workflow); no safeguarding concern or same-day operational issue is present.

args.title: Same-day cancellation: Noah Patel OT 3pm today — reschedule needed

args.body:
Hi Anita,

Thank you for letting us know so quickly. We're sorry to hear Noah isn't feeling well — hope he feels better soon!

We've received your request to cancel today's 3pm OT appointment and a member of our front desk team will be in touch with you today to get Noah rescheduled. In the meantime, we've flagged a potential opening with James Owens, OTR/L on Monday, May 5th at 10:00am, which our staff will discuss with you when they reach out.

You can also call us at your convenience if you'd prefer to sort it out by phone.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Front desk must contact Anita Patel today (555-0108 or email) to confirm the pending_review hold on James Owens OT slot 2026-05-05 10:00am, or find an alternative — and review late-cancellation policy applicability.

items.decision_rationale: Policy explicitly classifies same-day cancellations as P1 operational issues requiring prompt action. Noah Patel was confirmed as an active existing patient (pat_noah_patel), making this a straightforward scheduling request with no missing intake data. A pending_review hold was placed on the next available OT slot (James Owens, 2026-05-05 10:00am) for human staff to confirm or replace when they contact the family today.
